content: Solibri (the dominant BIM rule-checking UX reference) assigns every checking result one of 3 severity tiers — Critical (red), Moderate (orange), Low (yellow) — shown as colored triangle icons, filterable in the results list and checking-report export. Severity is auto-assigned by category or by how far a value deviates from the requirement (e.g. door width shortfall). buildingSMART IDS validation (also supported in Solibri) produces a pass/fail report per requirement with itemized non-conformance detail, IFC-element-linked. This traffic-light + itemized-list pattern is the AEC industry standard for surfacing rule-check results to architects.
